cases.prompt: Audit a local demo site that skipped analytics and launch. It has TASK-PLAN.md evidence and the user did not ask for production launch.
cases.expected: skip_with_reason using out_of_scope_demo, with user-visible impact

cases.prompt: A task says Stitch was planned but not executed, yet progress screen says it ran. Decide whether to continue.
cases.expected: return_to_rework or block; planned_counted_as_ran is rejected

cases.prompt: A public site journey requires SERP data but the user has not approved OpenSERP/proxy/network collection.
